archimate:ApplicationComponent.name: Data Integration
archimate:ApplicationComponent.documentation:
Definition: Data Integration ABB is an Application Component that implements the process of combining data from different sources or systems into a unified view, ensuring consistency, accuracy, and accessibility. It involves transforming and merging data from various formats, structures, and locations to provide a comprehensive and integrated data set.
Source: Wikipedia
Source reference: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Data_integration
LOST view: Technical view - application
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/DataIntegrationApplicationComponent
ABB name: egovera:DataIntegrationApplicationComponent
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/DataIntegrationApplicationComponent
Name: Data Integration Application Service
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalApplication
Specialises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DigitalSolutionApplicationComponent

properties.value: Data Integration ABB is an Application Component that implements the process of combining data from different sources or systems into a unified view, ensuring consistency, accuracy, and accessibility. It involves transforming and merging data from various formats, structures, and locations to provide a comprehensive and integrated data set.
